description: Platform operator opens a 7-day adjustment window on a closed period to register corrections of the closed month. requirePlatformOperator() on page and Server Action; notFound() on unresolvable org. Added by CHG-012 (page shipped in US-083; page self-declares data-screen=SCR-adjustment-period).
title: Abrir período de ajuste

sections.title: Abrir período de ajuste
sections.content: Permite registrar correcciones del mes cerrado durante una ventana temporal de 7 días.

fields.label: Confirmo que entiendo que se reabre una ventana de 7 días sobre un mes cerrado
